overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through a desert industrial compound with single-story buildings, power transmission towers, and distant mountains. The character explores the open dirt area surrounded by warehouse structures and utility infrastructure under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert industrial yard near administrative building

events.description: character walks past the tall metal derrick structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking away from the beige administrative building with satellite dish toward the open industrial yard

entered.detail: single-story beige building with white trim and satellite dish on roof
tall triangular metal tower structure with ladder rungs
long single-story concrete building with multiple windows
large metal lattice transmission towers with power lines

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking away from a beige administrative building with a satellite dish, heading into an open desert industrial yard. The tall metal derrick stands prominently ahead while long warehouse buildings and power transmission towers are visible in the distant background under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial compound corridor between warehouse buildings

events.description: moving from open yard into the corridor between parallel long warehouse buildings
character begins turning right to change direction toward the power line area

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial corridor between long barracks-style buildings on both sides

entered.detail: long single-story concrete building parallel to the left building, creating a corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks between two long parallel warehouse buildings that form a corridor through the industrial compound. The ground transitions to concrete slabs as the character moves deeper into the complex, with mountains visible in the distant background. The tall metal derrick recedes to the left rear as the character approaches a turning point.

scene_state.functional_zone: power transmission area with utility buildings

events.description: turning toward building with garage doors and large power transmission towers
approaching close to large power transmission towers with visible lattice structure

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward the power transmission towers and garage buildings

entered.detail: low beige building with metal roll-up garage doors and small windows

segments.scene_description: After turning right, the character walks toward a cluster of large power transmission towers and a low garage building with roll-up doors. The long warehouse buildings recede into the distance to the left as the character approaches the utility infrastructure area, with the ground returning to dirt and gravel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert industrial compound that shifts from an open yard into a narrow corridor before opening up toward a utility infrastructure area. It begins with the character walking away from a beige administrative building and satellite dish, heading across an open dirt yard toward a prominent metal derrick under the bright midday sun. As the character moves deeper into the complex, the environment narrows into a corridor between two long parallel warehouse buildings where the ground transitions to concrete slabs. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, leaving the warehouses behind and moving across dirt and gravel toward a cluster of large power transmission towers and a low garage building with roll-up doors.
